x-component.description: Compare the translated text units between several documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

generateTMX.description: Generates an output document in TMX
generateTMX.title: Generate a TMX output document

tmxPath.description: Full path of the output TMX file
tmxPath.title: TMX output path

autoOpen.title: Opens the first HTML output after completion
autoOpen.description: Opens the first HTML result file in the default browser after completion

genericCodes.title: Use generic representation (e.g. <1>...</1>) for the inline codes
genericCodes.description: Uses generic numbered tags (e.g. <1>...</1>) instead of original inline codes in the HTML report

target2Suffix.title: Suffix for target language code of document 2
target2Suffix.description: Suffix appended to the target language code for document 2 entries in TMX output

target3Suffix.title: Suffix for target language code of document 3
target3Suffix.description: Suffix appended to the target language code for document 3 entries in TMX output

document1Label.title: Label for the document 1
document1Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the base translation

document2Label.title: Label for the document 2
document2Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the second translation

document3Label.title: Label for the document 3
document3Label.description: Label used in reports to identify the optional third translation

useDataLog.title: Append the average results to a log
useDataLog.description: Appends average comparison scores to a tab-delimited log file after each run

dataLogPath.description: Full path for the log file
dataLogPath.title: Log file

useAltTrans.description: Use the XLIFF alt-trans of the trans-unit
useAltTrans.title: Use alt-trans for document 1

altTransOrigin.description: Value of the origin attribute of the alt-trans to use
altTransOrigin.title: Value in origin attribute
